title: Device, computer program and method
abstract: A method comprising the steps of: receiving an image from a dynamic vision sensor and an image from an image sensor, wherein the dynamic vision sensor and the image sensor capture at least an overlapping field of view; determining, from the image received from the dynamic vision sensor, an area of movement in the field of view of the image from the image sensor; applying a higher level of image compression to the areas of no movement compared with the area of movement in the image from the image sensor to produce a processed image; and outputting the processed image to a neural network.
claims: 11. An apparatus comprising: circuitry configured to: receive a first image data from a dynamic vision sensor and a second image data from an image sensor, wherein the dynamic vision sensor and the image sensor capture images having an overlapping field of view, determine, from at least the first image data received from the dynamic vision sensor and at least the second image data from the image sensor, an area of movement within the first and second image data, apply image compression to the first and second image data based on the area of movement to produce a processed image, and output the processed image to a neural network.
